items.summary: Fix the bootstrap logic in the backend so that when the Admin table is empty and a Principal logs in for the first time, that Principal is assigned the role 'super_admin' instead of 'admin'.

Add automatic recovery logic inside authenticated update calls that require admin privileges: if super_admin_count == 0, automatically promote the calling Principal's role to 'super_admin' (replace existing 'admin' role). This must not be a separate dedicated function — it must run inline within existing privileged update calls.

Update the migration module (backend/migration.mo) to ensure that when migrating legacy admin records, if no record carries role 'super_admin' after migration, the first migrated record is promoted to 'super_admin' rather than leaving all records as 'admin'.
